name: Spiced & Cola
description: A simple highball pairing BACARDÍ Spiced rum with chilled cola and a gentle stir over ice. A fun twist on the classic rum and Coke, BACARDÍ Spiced & Cola is a party pleaser that's sure to surprise the tastebuds. Get set to spice things up.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice.
Give it all a gentle stir.
searchable_text: Spiced & Cola main rum BACARDÍ Spiced rum A simple highball pairing BACARDÍ Spiced rum with chilled cola and a gentle stir over ice. A fun twist on the classic rum and Coke, BACARDÍ Spiced & Cola is a party pleaser that's sure to surprise the tastebuds. Get set to spice things up. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum, 100 ml cola recipe steps Fill a highball glass with cubed ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced. Add the chilled cola. Give it all a gentle stir.
